name: A.S. Roma S.P.A.
summary: A.S. Roma S.p.A. operates a football club in Italy. The company operates a stadium; sells match tickets, and television and radio rights; sells AS Roma branded products through AS Roma stores; and licenses AS Roma branded products. It also engages in the multi-year rights management of players; and sponsorship and advertising business. The company was founded in 1927 and is based in Rome, Italy.
